name: Italian Sausage Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Place pie shell in a pie pan; place in the oven during pre-heating time for 5 to 10 minutes to firm the bottom. Do not overcook!
Remove casing from sausage and crumble it. Sauté sausage and onions, then drain. Spoon into prepared pie pan.
Blend eggs, milk or cream, shredded mozzarella, salt, and pepper to taste. Pour over sausage mixture in the pie pan.
Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes or until custard sets and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool slightly. Cut into 8 wedges and serve.
